Azik.primary_clothing: Classic academic suit, chocolate brown wool, white shirt, black tie
Azik.face_description: soft facial features, eyes revealing an indescribable sense of weariness
Azik.visual_anchor: mid-40s male, medium skin tone, short black hair, brown eyes, wearing a chocolate brown academic suit with a calm expression
Azik.source_notes: Text explicitly provides full physical description including the mole.

Senior Associate Professor Cohen.face_description: deep, blue eyes sunk deep into his face and he had few wrinkles
Senior Associate Professor Cohen.visual_anchor: late 50s male, pale skin, grey thinning hair, wearing spectacles and a formal grey academic gown
Senior Associate Professor Cohen.accessories: black cane, pocket watch on a golden chain
Senior Associate Professor Cohen.source_notes: First name is Quentin. Text confirms deep set blue eyes, silver hair, black tuxedo, pocket watch with golden chain, and black cane.

Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline, giving off a distinct scholarly air
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, short black hair, brown eyes, thin build, average-looking features with a deep outline, scholarly air, wearing a linen shirt
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: Claims to have lost recent memories (amnesia)
Klein Moretti.accessories: black silver-inlaid ebony cane, bronze revolver with wooden grip in an underarm holster
Klein Moretti.role: Civilian staff at Blackthorn Security Company
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Text explicitly mentions his usual brownish-yellow coat, his purchase of the ebony cane, and him wearing the revolver in an underarm holster.

Welch McGovern.primary_clothing: Expensive Victorian gentleman suit, pale blue waistcoat, white cravat, gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.face_description: Soft features of a wealthy youth, rounded chin, bright curious eyes, friendly expression
Welch McGovern.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, light brown hair, blue eyes, wearing an expensive pale blue Victorian waistcoat and a gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.distinguishing_features: Died by repeatedly hitting his head against a wall
Welch McGovern.accessories: Gold pocket watch, leather-bound ancient notebook
Welch McGovern.source_notes: Police confirmed his death by apparent suicide in his house.

Naya.primary_clothing: Modest Victorian scholar's dress, high collar, dark green wool
Naya.face_description: Thin face, sharp intelligent eyes, focused expression, narrow nose
Naya.visual_anchor: early 20s female, fair skin, dark brown hair in a low bun, hazel eyes, wearing a dark green high-collar Victorian dress
Naya.distinguishing_features: Died by drowning herself in a washbasin
Naya.source_notes: Police confirmed her death and her soft brown hair was mentioned in Klein's vision/imagination of the scene.

Harvin Stone.face_description: Stern face framed by a black beard.
Harvin Stone.visual_anchor: Middle-aged male instructor, black beard, wearing a white shirt and black tuxedo.
Harvin Stone.source_notes: Age, facial hair, and clothing explicitly stated in text.

John Browning.primary_clothing: Victorian suit, grey and brown tones
John Browning.visual_anchor: 30s male, fair skin, short brown hair, wearing a grey Victorian suit
John Browning.source_notes: Mentioned only by name as a reporter for the Tingen Morning Post.

Dunn Smith.face_description: A mature face with a slightly high hairline and deep, abstruse gray eyes. His expression is often calm, sometimes featuring a polite but unusual smile.
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: late 30s male, fair skin, short dark brown hair with a high receding hairline, deep gray eyes, wearing a black top hat and a knee-length black trench coat, holding a tobacco pipe
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: Enjoys smoking tobacco mixed with mint leaves
Dunn Smith.accessories: pipe, gorgeous golden pocket watch on a golden chain
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Rozanne states there are two Sequence 7s in Tingen and suspects Dunn is a Sequence 7 Nightmare due to his dream abilities.

Selena.primary_clothing: Victorian modest day dress with simple lace collar
Selena.face_description: Youthful, cheerful face with bright, deep brown eyes.
Selena.visual_anchor: Teenage female, almost 16, wine-red hair, deep brown eyes, cheerful expression, wearing a modest Victorian day dress.
Selena.color_palette: wine-red, deep brown, cream, pastel blue
Selena.source_notes: Age, hair color, eye color, and religion confirmed in text. Clothing and other physical features guessed based on setting.

Rozanne.primary_clothing: light green Loen-styled dress with beautiful laces on sleeves, collar, and chest
Rozanne.face_description: Bright forehead and light-brown eyes, often seen with a sweet and friendly smile.
Rozanne.visual_anchor: Early 20s female, brown hair, light-brown eyes, bright forehead, wearing a light green Loen-style dress with white lace details.
Rozanne.color_palette: light green, brown, white, soft cream
Rozanne.source_notes: Described explicitly as a 'brown-haired girl' with 'light brown eyes'.
